posts.author: slovak82 (Rostyslav )
posts.cookedHtml:
Greetings, all!

We are using connect board column with mirror columns to fill in the data in both boards at the same time.

To do it we used to enter the item name and connecting it manually.

Right now, this search option does not work, and shows the full list of data, not the exact one.

Could you help with this issue?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @slovak82,

Just to confirm, the specific item is not appearing even when you search for it via the search bar?

If this is the case, can you please try these initial troubleshooting steps?

  • Please test this behaviour in an incognito window

  • Please try duplicating the column

Thanks for your help!

posts.author: Timonday (Tim Oliver)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BiancaT

I have the same problem today. This affecting multiple users. Using an In-Private window did not fix it.

Duplicating the column also did not help.

Thanks.

posts.author: Timonday (Tim Oliver)
posts.cookedHtml:
@slovak82 Did you ever get this working. Unfortunately I cannot see your reply where you said how you fixed this.

I am having the same issue at the moment.

Thanks.
